expectations.evidence: Net worth of $1,666,682.35 is shown in the heading and in the Net Worth Breakdown summary table.
Markdown tables list accounts with name, institution, and balance for each category.
Accounts are grouped under Real Estate, Investment Accounts, Depository Accounts (Cash), Credit Cards (Liabilities), and Other.
All amounts use dollar signs with comma separators and two decimal places (e.g., $652,400.00, -$13,141.76, $128,278.22).
